   "reasoning": "The hemorrhage of talent among our educators and leaders is a symptom of a deeper disease – our failure to care for the most vulnerable among us. We're hemorrhaging not just teachers but also hope for the most marginalized communities. To stem this tide, we need to throw everything we can at it – more funding, more incentives, more support for the students most at risk of dropping out. And for heaven's sake, let's hire some more staff to take some of the load off these overworked educators.",
